title: Apply Consistent Spacing to MultiplayerGameInfo Component Layout
description: Refactor MultiplayerGameInfo component to use design system spacing variables. Ensure consistent layout organization across all multiplayer game states (waiting, playing, spectating, disconnected).
acceptanceCriteria: Replace hardcoded spacing with CSS variables throughout component
Consistent padding in all game state cards (opponent disconnected, turn indicator, game over)
Proper alignment of status badges, player indicators, and buttons
Responsive spacing for mobile and desktop
Disconnection warning maintains visual prominence with new spacing
Spectator mode layout uses consistent spacing
All animation states (victory, defeat, draw) display correctly
Turn indicator arrow animation works with new spacing
technicalNotes: Multiple states to handle: waiting, spectating, victory, defeat, draw, opponent disconnected
Pay attention to nested GlassCard components and spacing hierarchy
Test all combinations of playerRole and connection states
Ensure StatusBadge component uses consistent spacing patterns
testingStrategy: Visual tests for all 7+ game states. Responsive tests. Animation timing verification. Test state transitions for smooth layout changes.
rollbackPlan: Revert to previous spacing values if any state breaks visually
